summary: Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience building scalable, production-grade web applications using JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and NestJS. Proven track record delivering real-time tracking systems, cloud infrastructure platforms (OpenStack, Ceph), and microservices architectures. Adept at owning projects end-to-end — from REST API design and database modeling to responsive frontend implementation and CI/CD deployment. Seeking a challenging remote or on-site role where I can drive technical decisions and ship high-impact products.

one.title: Abrvand
one.description: Contributed to a cloud-native platform for infrastructure automation, building performant UI dashboards and high-throughput Fastify API endpoints with Redis caching.
one.technologies: React, Redux, Material UI (frontend) - Fastify, Couchbase, Redis (backend)

two.title: Karan Jobseeker Platform
two.description: A job-seeker/employer web platform built with React, Mantine UI and Tailwind — featuring resume builder, job listings, and application management for thousands of active users.

three.title: Koja Tracking System
three.description: A real-time GPS tracking and fleet management PWA built with React, Mantine UI, Tailwind, and OpenLayers — enabling live vehicle/asset monitoring, route history, and operational workflow management.
three.technologies: React, Nextjs, Mantine UI, Tailwind, PWA

four.title: Winca
four.description: Designed and delivered a full-stack SaaS platform end-to-end, managing both engineering and product roadmap. Implemented JWT authentication, role-based access control
four.technologies: React, Nextjs, Tailwind (frontend) / Nestjs, MySQL, TypeORM (backend)

five.title: React Tailwind UI package
five.description: Published an open-source React component library with 15+ accessible, composable UI components built on Tailwind CSS and Floating UI. Available on NPM.

six.title: Soccer Prediction Platform
six.description: Built a real-time soccer prediction platform with live match data integration. Handled 100+ concurrent users.
six.technologies: React, Tailwind, Ant Design (frontend) / Nestjs, MySQL, TypeORM (backend)

description.one: Architected and delivered core features for a cloud infrastructure platform built on OpenStack, reducing feature delivery time through modular microservice design.
description.two: Built and integrated object storage services using Ceph / S3-compatible APIs, enabling scalable file management for the platform's enterprise clients.
description.three: Developed a real-time monitoring dashboard with ESB integration using React and Redux, providing live visibility into system health across 10+ infrastructure components.
description.four: Designed and deployed 5 microservices supporting cloud platform functionality, improving system scalability and decoupling critical services.
description.five: Collaborated cross-functionally with product and infrastructure teams to analyze requirements and deliver cloud-related features end-to-end within sprint cycles.

description.one: Built the full frontend of the Koja Tracking System using React, Mantine UI, and OpenLayers, enabling real-time GPS tracking and management workflows for 1,000+ daily active users.
description.two: Integrated OpenLayers maps for live tracking with WebSocket-based location updates, achieving sub-second position refresh rates.
description.three: Collaborated with backend and mobile teams to align API contracts, reducing integration bugs by ~30% through shared TypeScript interfaces and clear documentation.
description.four: Led frontend architecture decisions for 3 tracking products (Koja, Asan Service, Karan), standardizing component libraries and cutting UI development time.
description.five: Developed end-to-end frontend and backend of the main Faradid company website, from REST API design with Nest.js to production deployment, reducing page load time by 15%.

description.one: Maintained and enhanced the Karan job-seeker platform serving 50,000+ registered users, improving core UX flows and reducing reported bugs.
description.two: Built a resume builder system from scratch using React and component-based architecture, adopted by 1,000+ users within the first 3 months of launch.
description.three: Led the migration of the Karan platform from Next.js v8 to v10, adopting incremental static regeneration (ISR) and improved image optimization, reducing build times by ~40% and improving Core Web Vitals scores.
description.four: Introduced and integrated a utility-first CSS approach (like Tailwind CSS), reducing stylesheet size by 60% and improving UI development consistency across the team.

description.one: Built and maintained frontend components for a Learning Management System (LMS) using React, focusing on reusable, accessible component design serving 100+ students.
description.two: Delivered 20+ pixel-perfect responsive pages from Figma designs with full cross-browser and cross-device compatibility.
description.three: Created and maintained the company's main website using React and Next.js, achieving 90+ Lighthouse performance and SEO scores.
